summary: Iteration 3 E2E testing of GO Repair CRM's 4 new features (Razorpay mock, WhatsApp/SMS notifications mock, Leaflet GPS tracking, bulk CSV import). Created /app/backend/tests/test_gorepair_iter3.py with 21 new pytest cases — ALL 21 PASS. Full backend suite 49/49 (28 regression + 21 new) passing. Playwright UI testing across admin/manager/technician covered every new UI flow — all PASS. No blocker bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py now ~1293 lines — EXCEEDS the 700-line split guideline. Strongly recommend refactoring into routers: auth.py, leads.py, wallet.py, razorpay.py, notifications.py, tracking.py, bulk_import.py, analytics.py. This will become critical before any further feature additions.
Notification send is fire-and-forget inside assign-manager/technician/status handlers; no retry on failure (acceptable for MOCK mode, but mark as TECH-DEBT before integrating Twilio/Gupshup).
/api/leads/bulk-import inserts rows sequentially validated in-memory; no per-row duplicate-phone check (existing customers with same phone can be duplicated). Consider optional dedupe-by-phone flag.

Razorpay MOCK /verify has no amount cross-check against order creation — user can create a 100 INR order then verify with amount_inr=200000 and be credited 200000 pts. In LIVE mode Razorpay's signature check prevents this, but the MOCK path should still validate amount consistency.
Razorpay RzpVerifyIn has no upper bound on amount_inr (RzpOrderIn caps at 200000 but verify doesn't). Consistent bounds recommended.
NotificationsPage shows phone numbers and customer names to every role (super_admin, manager, technician) — consider PII masking for technician role.

GET /api/technicians/locations for manager role returns techs scoped by manager_id — but if a technician has never had manager_id set (edge case seed), they disappear from the live map entirely. Minor.

MapPage clears watchPosition correctly on unmount but geolocation pushInterval keeps firing every 60s even when user navigates away before cleanup if route change is async — already mostly handled, just flag for review.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_gorepair_iter3.py (new - 21 tests covering Razorpay mock, GPS push/list, bulk CSV import, notification side-effects)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of all tested flows across 3 roles

test_credentials: Used seeded creds from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. All working.
seed_data_creation: Created ~5 TEST_ prefixed leads via CSV bulk-import tests and 1 TEST_N_ lead for notification flow test. Not cleaned up but tagged for identification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 iteration-3 features work end-to-end in MOCK mode. Razorpay credits wallet correctly (verified +500 UI, +1500/+2000 API). Tech GPS push works (Amit's location visible on admin map). Manager map shows Leaflet tiles + CircleMarker pin + side panel with 2 tech cards. Notifications persist for lead_assigned_manager, lead_assigned_technician, lead_completed_customer and are visible in /notifications page. Bulk CSV import handles headered/headerless/malformed rows. The CSV import dialog stays open after upload to show created/skipped counts — this is intentional UX, not a bug (dismiss via 'Done' button). Razorpay is in MOCK mode because RAZORPAY_KEY_ID is empty in backend/.env. To switch to LIVE mode, populate RAZORPAY_KEY_ID and RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET.
mocked_integrations_validated: POST /api/wallet/razorpay/create-order — returns order.id starting with 'order_MOCK_' and amount in paise
POST /api/wallet/razorpay/verify — credits wallet directly without opening Razorpay checkout iframe (as expected in mock)
send_notification() — writes to db.notifications with status='mocked' and logs; visible in /api/notifications list
rca of the issue: No bugs found during iteration-3 testing. One test-script self-issue (wrong field name 'amount' vs actual 'points' in wallet txn response) was fixed in the test file itself — no backend change needed.
